mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-power-efficient SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-power-efficient SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at power-efficient@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-power-efficient SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-power-efficient SIG maintains 6 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-power-efficient.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-power-efficient SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-power-efficient SIG has 4 Maintainers, including: Que Yanwen, Wu Haotian, Jiang Yi. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
